location: Metropolitan Correctional Center, New York, NY
text: Bureau of Prisons records document Epstein detention at MCC New York, July 2019 — evidence log growing.
BOP record: Epstein denied bail at hearing, returned to FCI Estill without incident, July 18, 2019.

location: FCI Ray Brook, Ray Brook, NY
text: BOP log: Epstein added to CFSA (sex offender) roster at FCI Ray Brook, interviewed by staff.
Search warrant executed at Epstein's NYC townhouse — compact discs seized as evidence of sex trafficking
MCC records: Epstein placed on psychiatric observation 7/8/19–7/10/19 with inmate companion monitor
